goal: Implement or design explicit duplicate occurrence selection without auto-resolution.
whatWasImplemented: Added a read-only duplicate occurrence model carrying file path, line number, raw line, raw value, and source depth.
Added a disabled manual occurrence selector scaffold with production_write_enabled=false.
Wired a disabled duplicate occurrence selector surface into the setting detail pane.
The detail pane shows file path, line number, raw line, current value, and source depth for each occurrence.
Added disabled future action controls labeled Choose this occurrence (planned).
Added a duplicate occurrence review workflow model with no-selection, invalid-selection, and selected-but-production-disabled states.
The review workflow records selected occurrence path, line, raw line, current value, proposed value, and source depth without enabling Apply.
Added safe-env duplicate occurrence replacement proof for exact selected line replacement.
Added backup byte-equality, reread verification, and restore-on-failure proof for fixture duplicate replacement.
Kept duplicate-conflict settings blocked in the active safe-batch path.
Added deterministic tests that assert duplicate blocked copy remains active.
Added duplicate occurrence confirmation state with missing, pending, confirmed, rejected, and expired states.
Added confirmation token matching and an occurrence fingerprint derived from selected path, line number, raw line, and raw value.
Safe-env replacement is allowed only after explicit token confirmation; production Apply remains disabled.
Added deterministic tests for missing selection, wrong token, confirmed token, expired confirmation, and production-disabled status.
Added duplicate production approval gate scaffold with missing, pending, confirmed-but-production-disabled, rejected, expired, and fingerprint-mismatch states.
Added explicit occurrence precondition record with path, line number, raw line, old value, source depth, and fingerprint.
Added confirmation-gated safe-env duplicate replacement wrapper; fixture replacement cannot run unless the confirmed occurrence fingerprint still matches.

Added tests for missing approval, pending approval, confirmed-but-production-disabled, fingerprint mismatch, unconfirmed replacement blocking, stale occurrence blocking, and confirmed safe-env replacement success.
Added disabled duplicate pre-Apply approval review UI around the production approval gate.
The UI shows approval state, selected occurrence path, line number, raw line, old value, source depth, precondition fingerprint, and block reason.
The UI includes a disabled Confirm duplicate target (planned) action and continues to show duplicate Apply as blocked.
Added source-level UI tests proving the review surface exists and remains disabled.
Controlled live-test guard records backup/hash/restore prerequisites for duplicate replacement before any live mutation; production duplicate writes remain disabled.

Added a guarded temp-fixture executor that requires confirmed occurrence, matching fingerprint, matching raw line, matching old value, backup, replacement verification, byte-exact restore, and restored content fingerprint verification.
Added copied-config-tree duplicate proof that replaces a confirmed copied duplicate occurrence, verifies the copied change, restores copied bytes, and verifies original files unchanged.

Added a default-disabled duplicate production gate review that requires confirmed occurrence, matching fingerprint, path, line number, raw line, old value, source depth, copied-config-tree proof, and production flag before any production Apply integration.

Connected duplicate production gate review to the shared explicit approval-flow model; copied proof plus confirmed occurrence can reach approved_but_default_disabled, never production enabled by default.

Added a disabled duplicate approval review card on the Config page. It shows selected occurrence, target path, line number, raw line, old/proposed values, fingerprint/precondition status, copied proof status, approval status, production-disabled state, blockers, and an insensitive planned enable action.
The duplicate approval card is now fed from serialized report data and covered by GTK safe-env screenshot plus AT-SPI accessibility-tree assertions.
Duplicate activation decision review now consumes report-backed card data and reaches ApprovedButDefaultDisabled while production duplicate writes remain disabled.

Duplicate activation path now consumes the ApprovedButDefaultDisabled decision and report-backed proof data, then stops at ActivationPathNeedsExplicitProductionFlag with production duplicate writes disabled.

Duplicate activation control now validates complete review-only request and safety-plan inputs, proves the executor is Unwired, reaches ValidatedButExecutorUnwired, and still keeps production duplicate writes disabled.

Duplicate activation form/state machine now collects review-only request fields, safety acknowledgements, backup/restore/reread/post-restore plans, dry-run summary, and touched-file list, then validates through the activation control as review-only with the executor still Unwired.
Duplicate activation form values now render through real disabled GTK Entry, TextView, and CheckButton fields with stable widget names and screenshot/accessibility field-label assertions.
Duplicate activation draft plumbing can update/reset form values in memory, validates through the existing form/control pipeline as review-only, and never persists data or wires the executor.

Duplicate activation draft persistence now has an explicit default-disabled boundary: persistence is forbidden by default, no draft is written to disk, storage path is none, and the executor remains Unwired.

Duplicate production activation now has a default-disabled safety gate that requires byte-exact backup, write/reread/restore, no-auto-apply, persisted-draft auto-apply, final approval, production flag, and executor wiring proof before activation can be reconsidered.
whatWasNotImplemented: No automatic duplicate choice was added.
No production duplicate write path was enabled.
No real config duplicate cleanup was attempted.
blockers: Needs explicit production flag and live restoration proof before duplicate replacement can be wired to production Apply.

Temp-fixture and copied-config-tree executors now prove stale line, raw-line mismatch, old-value mismatch, source-layer duplicate, and same-file duplicate preconditions; explicit production flag review is still required before production Apply integration.
Needs production safe-batch integration review that still refuses real config unless explicitly approved.
nextRecommendedWork: Stop duplicate non-production runway work here; open a separately approved production activation phase only if explicitly requested.

duplicateActivationDraftReview.updateResetStatus: Modeled and tested in memory only
